co.edu.unbosque.proveedor - package co.edu.unbosque.proveedor
Package containing the main entry point for the provider service application.
co.edu.unbosque.proveedor.controller - package co.edu.unbosque.proveedor.controller
Package containing REST controllers for provider management.
co.edu.unbosque.proveedor.model - package co.edu.unbosque.proveedor.model
Package representing a provider (supplier/provider).
co.edu.unbosque.proveedor.repository - package co.edu.unbosque.proveedor.repository
Package containing repository interfaces for provider entities.
co.edu.unbosque.proveedor.service - package co.edu.unbosque.proveedor.service
Package containing for managing provider entities.

Creates a new Proveedor.

Creates a new Proveedor.
crear(T) - Method in interface co.edu.unbosque.proveedor.service.CRUDOperations
Create a new record for the given entity.
CRUDOperations<T> - Interface in co.edu.unbosque.proveedor.service
Generic interface defining basic CRUD operations that service classes implement for their corresponding domain entities.
